sql.if: AND (t.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR f.path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

choose.when: AND dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0

choose.otherwise:
/* status 필터 있는 경우: 기존 방식 (dp JOIN 필수) */ SELECT dp.data_processing_idx AS remediationId, f.hash_id AS findNo, f.path AS findPath, f.regdate AS findDate, t.TARGET_ID AS targetId, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, s.data_type AS datatype, dp.approval_status AS approvalStatus, CASE WHEN dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS processYn, dp.user_no AS processUserNo, dp.regdate AS processDate, dp.notepad AS notepad, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS groupName FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_summary s ON f.target_id = s.target_id AND f.ap_no = s.ap_no AND f.hash_id = s.object_id LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.target_id = dp.target_id AND f.ap_no = dp.ap_no AND f.hash_id = dp.hash_id LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
ORDER BY f.regdate DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no
LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.target_id = dp.target_id AND f.ap_no = dp.ap_no AND f.hash_id = dp.hash_id
LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y'
WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'

SELECT dp.data_processing_idx AS remediationId, f.hash_id AS findNo, f.path AS findPath, f.account AS account, f.owner AS owner, f.regdate AS findDate, f.credate AS createDate, t.TARGET_ID AS targetId, t.NAME AS targetName, COALESCE(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.connected_ip) AS targetIp, t.PLATFORM AS targetOs, s.data_type AS datatype, s.match_count AS matchCount, dp.approval_status AS approvalStatus, CASE WHEN dp.processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND dp.processing_flag != 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS processYn, dp.processing_flag AS processingFlag, dp.user_no AS processUserNo, dp.regdate AS processDate, dp.notepad AS notepad, COALESCE(ptg.name, '미그룹') AS groupName FROM pi_data_processing dp INNER JOIN pi_find f ON dp.target_id = f.target_id AND dp.ap_no = f.ap_no AND dp.hash_id = f.hash_id INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no LEFT JOIN pi_summary s ON f.target_id = s.target_id AND f.ap_no = s.ap_no AND f.hash_id = s.object_id LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO AND a.AGENT_USE = 'Y' LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON tg.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND t.AP_NO = tg.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group ptg ON tg.up_idx = ptg.idx WHERE dp.data_processing_idx = #{remediationId}
mapper.update: UPDATE pi_data_processing SET processing_flag = IFNULL(#{action}, 1), user_no = #{userNo}, regdate = NOW(), notepad = #{notepad} WHERE hash_id = #{hashId}
mapper.select: SELECT total.cnt AS totalFindings, dp_stat.processedCount, (total.cnt - dp_stat.processedCount) AS unprocessedCount, dp_stat.approvedCount, dp_stat.rejectedCount, dp_stat.waitingCount, dp_stat.returnedCount, ROUND(dp_stat.processedCount * 100.0 / NULLIF(total.cnt, 0), 1) AS remediationRate FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.target_id = t.target_id AND f.ap_no = t.ap_no WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y') total, (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN processing_flag IS NOT NULL AND processing_flag != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waitingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN approval_status = 'R' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS returnedCount FROM pi_data_processing) dp_stat
